system:
You are a professional translator. Translate the user's text into clear, faithful English. Preserve technical terms, part numbers, SKUs, dates, and amounts verbatim. Return strict JSON: {"translated_text": str, "source_language": str, "notes": str|null}.

KEYSIGHT TRANSLATION KB — apply these rules:
  • Formatting: Reformat number grouping per locale (1.000,00 in DE/ES, 1,000.00 in EN). Do NOT convert currency unless explicitly requested.
  • Preserve verbatim: Keysight
  • Preserve verbatim: Keysight Technologies
  • Preserve verbatim: SOA
  • Preserve verbatim: PO
  • Preserve verbatim: Q2O
  • Preserve verbatim: SSD
  • Preserve verbatim: WO
  • Preserve verbatim: ECCN
  • Preserve verbatim: EAR99
  • Preserve verbatim: EAR
  • Preserve verbatim: ITAR
  • Preserve verbatim: A2LA
  • Preserve verbatim: ISO 17025
  • Preserve verbatim: Z540.3
  • Preserve verbatim: ANSI/NCSL
  • Preserve verbatim: MIL-STD-461
  • Preserve verbatim: MIL-STD-810
  • Preserve verbatim: AS9100
  • Preserve verbatim: IATF 16949
  • Preserve verbatim: ISO 26262
  • Preserve verbatim: BERT
  • Preserve verbatim: VNA
  • Preserve verbatim: DSO
  • Preserve any token matching pattern: \\b(PO|Q|QT|QUOTE|SO|WO|INV|CCC|CC|CR)-[A-Z0-9-]+\\b
  • Preserve any token matching pattern: \\b[A-Z]\\d{4,5}[A-Z]?\\b
  • Preserve any token matching pattern: \\b[A-Z]{2,4}\\d{2,4}[A-Z]?\\b
  • Preserve any token matching pattern: \\bN\\d{4}[A-Z]?(-\\d+[A-Z]?)?\\b
  • Preserve any token matching pattern: \\bM\\d{4}[A-Z]\\b
  • Preserve any token matching pattern: \\b(MXA|EXA|UXA|UXR|FieldFox|InfiniiVision|Truevolt|Trueform|Streamline)\\b
  • Tone: Use formal business register. Spanish: usted form. Japanese: keigo (敬語). German: Sie form. French: vous form.
user:
SOURCE_LANGUAGE_HINT: es
TEXT:
Estimado equipo de Compras de Meridian Comunicaciones SA:

Acusamos recibo de su orden de compra PO-MERID-COMM-077-Q2O-73116 asociada a la cotización QT-MERID-COMM-077-DEMO. Hemos registrado los siguientes datos para su revisión:

- Número de PO: PO-MERID-COMM-077-Q2O-73116
- Cotización de referencia: QT-MERID-COMM-077-DEMO
- Fecha de envío solicitada: 2026-06-04
- Condiciones de pago: Net 60
- Importe total: 370.200,00

Líneas incluidas:
1. M9384B-04F — VXG Vector Signal Generator, 44 GHz, 2 canales, 2 GHz BW (Cant. 1)
2. N9040B-550 — UXA Signal Analyzer, 50 GHz, 510 MHz de ancho de análisis (Cant. 1)
3. CAL-A2LA-1Y — Servicio de Calibración A2LA/ISO 17025, 1 año (Cant. 1)
4. 85052D — Kit de Calibración Economy 3.5 mm, DC a 26,5 GHz (Cant. 1)

Hemos tomado nota de la variación señalada: la inclusión del kit de calibración 85052D, que no figuraba en la cotización original. Su pedido se encuentra actualmente en revisión interna para validar el precio de esta línea adicional antes de proceder con la conversión formal a orden de venta. Le confirmaremos la aceptación o, en su caso, le indicaremos si es necesario un PO revisado, dentro de los próximos 2 días hábiles, conforme a su solicitud de acuse.

Todos los envíos y facturas harán referencia al número de PO indicado.

Quedamos atentos a cualquier consulta.

Atentamente,
Equipo de SalesOps — Keysight Technologies

Return JSON only.

We acknowledge receipt of your purchase order PO-MERID-COMM-077-Q2O-73116 associated with quotation QT-MERID-COMM-077-DEMO. We have recorded the following details for your review:

- PO number: PO-MERID-COMM-077-Q2O-73116
- Reference quotation: QT-MERID-COMM-077-DEMO
- Requested ship date: 2026-06-04
- Payment terms: Net 60
- Total amount: 370,200.00

Included line items:
1. M9384B-04F — VXG Vector Signal Generator, 44 GHz, 2 channels, 2 GHz BW (Qty. 1)
2. N9040B-550 — UXA Signal Analyzer, 50 GHz, 510 MHz analysis bandwidth (Qty. 1)
3. CAL-A2LA-1Y — A2LA/ISO 17025 Calibration Service, 1 year (Qty. 1)
4. 85052D — Economy 3.5 mm Calibration Kit, DC to 26.5 GHz (Qty. 1)

We have noted the indicated variation: the inclusion of calibration kit 85052D, which was not listed in the original quotation. Your order is currently under internal review to validate the price of this additional line item before proceeding with the formal conversion to a sales order. We will confirm acceptance or, as applicable, advise whether a revised PO is required within the next 2 business days, in accordance with your acknowledgment request.

All shipments and invoices will reference the PO number indicated.

We remain available for any questions.

Sincerely,
SalesOps Team — Keysight Technologies","source_language":"es","notes":""}

parsed.translated_text:
Dear Meridian Comunicaciones SA Purchasing Team:

We acknowledge receipt of your purchase order PO-MERID-COMM-077-Q2O-73116 associated with quotation QT-MERID-COMM-077-DEMO. We have recorded the following details for your review:

- PO number: PO-MERID-COMM-077-Q2O-73116
- Reference quotation: QT-MERID-COMM-077-DEMO
- Requested ship date: 2026-06-04
- Payment terms: Net 60
- Total amount: 370,200.00

Included line items:
1. M9384B-04F — VXG Vector Signal Generator, 44 GHz, 2 channels, 2 GHz BW (Qty. 1)
2. N9040B-550 — UXA Signal Analyzer, 50 GHz, 510 MHz analysis bandwidth (Qty. 1)
3. CAL-A2LA-1Y — A2LA/ISO 17025 Calibration Service, 1 year (Qty. 1)
4. 85052D — Economy 3.5 mm Calibration Kit, DC to 26.5 GHz (Qty. 1)

We have noted the indicated variation: the inclusion of calibration kit 85052D, which was not listed in the original quotation. Your order is currently under internal review to validate the price of this additional line item before proceeding with the formal conversion to a sales order. We will confirm acceptance or, as applicable, advise whether a revised PO is required within the next 2 business days, in accordance with your acknowledgment request.

All shipments and invoices will reference the PO number indicated.

We remain available for any questions.

Sincerely,
SalesOps Team — Keysight Technologies
